creator: joneum@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Victor Kustov from comment #6)

pkg packages are generated from the ports.
If you say that it is ok from the ports, but not with pkg packages, so I suspect a problem here local on your side

I have not received any other reports of problems from nginx-naxsi. Also, all the tests I have now done because of your report were ok.
